idea.title: Gravity Mailman
idea.hook: Throw letters from a tiny planet — but each letter you launch shifts the planet's center of mass, deflecting your next throw.
idea.prototype: Side-view single screen with 1 small circular planet (player on top) and 5 mailbox planets in orbit. Click-drag to aim + throw a letter (parabolic trajectory under planet gravity). Each successful throw transfers letter mass to the target planet — your home planet's gravity weakens, shifting future trajectories. Letters in flight collide with mailboxes. Lives = 5 (missed letters lost). Win = deliver all 12 letters. Lose = run out of letters before delivering 12.
idea.mutation_of: Angry-Birds aim-and-throw + Marble Run 3D + Drift Boss arc-skill
idea.why_novel: Self-modifying physics field — your input changes the rules of your next input
idea.lose_condition: Run out of letters before delivering 12

sources.title: Gravity Mailman
sources.snippet: Adds a self-modifying physics field — your input changes the rules of your next input

synthesizer_brief: Aim-and-throw with mass-feedback; mastery requires predicting how previous throws warped space
